title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates a low-code approach to building AI applications for small teams without extensive AI expertise. The approach leverages corporate data via Cloud SQL and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL, using Gemini to enable natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendation capabilities with auto-generated code.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through a low-code path for small teams to build AI applications without deep AI expertise, drawing on corporate data stored in Cloud SQL and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. Gemini supplies natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendation capabilities, with code auto-generated rather than written by hand. The video matters for teams that hold their data in PostgreSQL and want to add AI features without staffing specialized roles. Key takeaways: the database layer serves as the data source, and Gemini connects that data to search and recommendation functionality through generated code.
